title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. australis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. australis, commonly known as woolly kidney vetch, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds and skin issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. australis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
